metadata.description: Azure region for the Recovery Services Vault
Use an existing Recovery Services Vault
Existing Recovery Services Vault resource ID (required if useExistingVault = true)
VM Resource IDs to protect with backup
Enable backup for Azure File Shares (single Storage Account)
Storage Account resource ID hosting the file shares (required if enableAzureFileShareBackup = true)
File share names to protect (comma-separated in UI, array in template)
Enable Azure Policy for auto-protection of tagged VMs
Tag key used to identify VMs for auto-protection
Tag value used to identify VMs for auto-protection
Log Analytics Workspace Resource ID for diagnostics
Enable Cross Region Restore (requires GeoRedundant storage)
Enable soft delete for backup items
Log Analytics Workspace Resource ID for diagnostics
VM backup schedule time (UTC, 24h format, e.g. 23:00)
Days of week for weekly backup
Deploy an Enhanced Policy (supports Trusted Azure VMs and full disk backup)
Deploy SQL Server in VM backup policy
Deploy Azure File Share backup policy
Array of VM Resource IDs to protect
Backup Policy Resource ID for Azure File Shares
Storage Account resource ID hosting the file shares

resources.name: [format('{0}/{1}/{2}/{3}', split(format('{0}/Azure/storagecontainer;Storage;{1};{2}', parameters('vaultName'), variables('storageAccountRgName'), variables('storageAccountName')), '/')[0], split(format('{0}/Azure/storagecontainer;Storage;{1};{2}', parameters('vaultName'), variables('storageAccountRgName'), variables('storageAccountName')), '/')[1], split(format('{0}/Azure/storagecontainer;Storage;{1};{2}', parameters('vaultName'), variables('storageAccountRgName'), variables('storageAccountName')), '/')[2], format('AzureFileShare;{0}', parameters('fileShareNames')[copyIndex()]))]
dependsOn: [resourceId('Microsoft.RecoveryServices/vaults/backupFabrics/protectionContainers', split(format('{0}/Azure/storagecontainer;Storage;{1};{2}', parameters('vaultName'), variables('storageAccountRgName'), variables('storageAccountName')), '/')[0], split(format('{0}/Azure/storagecontainer;Storage;{1};{2}', parameters('vaultName'), variables('storageAccountRgName'), variables('storageAccountName')), '/')[1], split(format('{0}/Azure/storagecontainer;Storage;{1};{2}', parameters('vaultName'), variables('storageAccountRgName'), variables('storageAccountName')), '/')[2])]

metadata.description: Tag key to identify VMs for auto-protection
Tag value to identify VMs for auto-protection
Azure region for policy assignment identity

properties.description: [format('Abilita automaticamente il backup per le VM con il tag {0}={1}', parameters('tagKey'), parameters('tagValue'))]
